+ - Update Japanese translations for new strings and fix fragment handling (#4050)

item.title: changedetection.io
item.description:
changedetection.io 变更摘要
新增(8):
+ HEAD / 2026-04-11 09:25:44 +0200:
+ - Notifications - Discord #3721 - Dont use   for discord (Actually Discord:// notifications should always use plaintext format anyway)
+ - Test improvement - text extract tidyup (#4048)
+ - Text filters - New simpler filter "Extract lines containing text" (#4046)
+ - Handle inline favicons (#4047 #3891 )
+ - UI - URL field should be just a string field (Not type=url) because URLs with Jinja2 macros could cause false errors #3777
+ - Add complete Turkish translation (#4044)
+ - Czech l12n updates (#4043)
删除(1):
- HEAD / 2026-04-10 13:08:28 +0200:

item.title: Cold Turkey - News
item.description:
Cold Turkey - News 变更摘要
新增(16):
+ Blocker 4.9(2) (1 Mar 2026)
+ * Added option to block split view in browsers (extension update pending)
+ * Added new folder picker on Windows
+ * Added ability to extend locked scheduled blocks
+ * Fixed multiple bugs caused by going into sleep mode on macOS
+ * Fixed incorrect Safari stats on macOS
+ * Fixed YouTube channel blocking/exceptions with collaborators
+ * Fixed some browsers not being blocked
+ * Fixed more time range bugs
+ * Fixed scheduled lock bugs and advanced warnings
+ * Fixed issue caused with comma in custom text break on macOS
+ * Fixed bug caused when exporting blocks
+ * Fixed bug after adding new blocks with settings password
+ * Fixed other minor bugs
+ Blocker 4.9(1) (1 Feb 2026)
+ Blocker 4.9(0) (1 Dec 2025)
删除(2):
- Blocker 4.9(2) (6 Feb 2026)
- Blocker 4.9 (1 Dec 2025)
